sourceName: U.S. Census ACS 2024 5-Year Housing Crowding - Greater Seattle Counties
notes: Official U.S. Census ACS 2020-2024 5-year Data Profile DP04 aggregate occupants-per-room county estimates. Covers King, Pierce, and Snohomish counties. No individual addresses, names, household sizes, occupancy records, devices, or household-level records are imported.
